journeys.title: Rajput Citadels
journeys.subtitle: Seven sandstone giants of the desert
journeys.description: A circuit through Rajasthan's mightiest forts — sandstone walls, glittering palaces, and centuries of valor.

journeys.title: UNESCO Classics
journeys.subtitle: World heritage at a glance
journeys.description: Eight inscribed monuments that define India's place on the world heritage map.

journeys.title: Dravidian Temple Trail
journeys.subtitle: Tower temples of the south
journeys.description: Granite gopurams and ritual tanks from the Pallava, Chola, and Vijayanagara dynasties.

journeys.title: Sacred Pilgrimage
journeys.subtitle: Char dham and beyond
journeys.description: From the snows of Kedarnath to Jagannath by the sea — five spiritual anchors of India.

journeys.title: Wild India
journeys.subtitle: Forests, marshes, salt flats
journeys.description: Tigers in Corbett, rhinos in Kaziranga, salt deserts in Kutch — India's natural extremes.

journeys.title: Colonial Skylines
journeys.subtitle: Bombay & Calcutta in marble and steel
journeys.description: Gateway, Victoria, Howrah — landmarks where the Empire met the sea.

journeys.title: Ancient Classrooms
journeys.subtitle: Where knowledge was carved into stone
journeys.description: Cave universities and rock-cut sanctuaries — India's earliest centers of learning and art.

journeys.title: Monsoon Getaways
journeys.subtitle: Mist, tea, and mountain air
journeys.description: Hill stations, tea estates, and valleys best experienced in the rain.
